About The Card
IDBI Bank Royale Signature Credit Card is designed for those who want better than the best services in every walk of life. IDBI Bank Royale Signature Credit Card is your “One Stop Card” for all the luxuries you deserve in life. This card brings to you unparalleled privileges to suit your lifestyle and preferences both in India and abroad.
This card is currently being offered with no joining fees, so hurry up! Call our Customer Care at 1800-209-4324 (Toll Free) or 022-67719100 (Call Charges Applicable) or visit the nearest IDBI Bank branch.
Credit Card Welcome e-Kit
The digitised Credit Card Welcome e-Kit is IDBI Bank’s constant endeavor towards the Go Green initiative. This e-Kit provides the cardholder with detailed information regarding Card Usage, Cardholders Agreement and Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC), in a downloadable PDF format.
Card Usage Guide
Download
Cardholders Agreement
Download

Download
Features and Benefits
Earn More while you Spend
The IDBI Bank Royale Signature Card understands your lifestyle and rewards you for your needs. You will earn 3 Delight Points for every Rs. 100 spent by you using your IDBI Bank Royale Signature Credit Card; so enjoy on travelling, shopping, dining-out or watching movies, get rewarded for all your spends. Additionally, enjoy bonus delight points as following:
500 bonus delight points on card activation.
750 bonus delight points on first transaction of Rs. 1,500 or more within 30 days of card activation.
Additional milestone benefit of 1,500 points on net annual spends of Rs. 2 lakhs.
Additional milestone benefit of 2,000 points on net annual spends of Rs. 4 lakhs.
*Delight points would be accrued only on transactions except the ones exempted from delight points accrual. Refer the exempted transaction categories here.
Interest Free Credit
Enjoy interest free credit of up to 48 days* on your purchases and manage your payments
as per your convenience. You can choose to pay the total outstanding amount, minimum
amount due or any other amount higher than the minimum amount due.
*Refer MITC for more details
Drive On
Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using IDBI Bank Royale Signature Card across all fuel stations for transactions in the range of Rs. 400 to Rs. 5000. So keep driving and enjoying with friends and family.
*Maximum waiver of upto Rs. 500 per month
Air Travel Accident Insurance Cover
IDBI Bank Royale Signature Credit Card provides an air travel accident insurance cover worth
Rs. 25 lakhs to put your mind at ease while you travel for business or leisure.
Airport Lounge Access
Enjoy luxury at select airport lounges in India. No matter which airline or class you fly, your Royale card offers you well deserved rest and use of facilities. You will surely find it useful to relieve travel fatigue and escape airport chaos.
The airport lounge access is being provided by VISA and is subject to change as per VISA’s discretion from time to time without any prior notice.
IDBI Bank Royale Signature Credit Card offers 1 complimentary lounge visit per calendar quarter at participating Airport Lounges in India.
For the list of participating Lounges please click here
Wider Acceptance
Get more freedom with your Royale Credit Card. You can use it at over 9 lakh merchants in India and over 29 million merchants abroad.
Zero Lost Card Liability
In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Customer Care 1800-209-4324 (Toll free) / 022-67719100 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank.
Family Cards
Make IDBI Bank your family Bank by gifting your family members (only for members above 18 years) an add-on Royale Signature
Credit Card. The add-on card enables your family members to avail all the benefits and features applicable on the primary card. The Delight Points earned on the add-on cards will be clubbed with those of the primary card and can be redeemed as per the higher eligibility.
You may apply for upto 2 add-on cards for your family members.
VISA offers
Customers will be eligible for exclusive offers on airport shopping, hotel, car rentals etc. which are provided for VISA Signature cardholders. Customers can enjoy travel concierge services provided by VISA for their travel related services. These offers are provided by VISA and may change as per VISA’s discretion from time to time without any prior notice.

About The Card
IDBI Bank welcomes you to a journey of elation and tranquility. You can escape to a tropical paradise, enjoy myriad of species underwater, pamper yourself in the most exotic hotels and relish your taste buds in the most delicious restaurants or discover the mesmerizing beauty of the world the way you want with the convenience, security and flexibility of your IDBI Bank Euphoria World Credit Card.
Experience world class privileges and rewards befitting your lifestyle and preferences with your IDBI Bank Euphoria World Credit Card.
For further details call Customer Care at 1800-209-4324 (Toll Free) or 022-67719100 (Call Charges Applicable) or visit the nearest IDBI Bank branch.

Features and Benefits
Earn More while you Spend
Euphoria World Credit Card is a power house of exciting gifts and offers exclusively designed for your travel needs. You can earn 6 Delight Points for every 100 you spend on travel related expenses viz. Hotels, Airlines, IRCTC, Bus Bookings etc. or earn 3 Delight Points on every other spent. Additionally, enjoy bonus delight points as following:
500 bonus delight points on card activation.
750 bonus delight points on first transaction of Rs. 5,000 or more within 30 days of card activation.
Additional milestone benefit of 1,500 points on net annual spends of Rs. 2 lakhs.
Additional milestone benefit of 2,000 points on net annual spends of Rs. 4 lakhs.
*Delight points would be accrued only on transactions except the ones exempted from delight points accrual. Refer the exempted transaction categories here.
Interest Free Credit
Enjoy interest free credit of up to 48 days* on your purchases and manage your payments as per your convenience. You can choose to pay the total outstanding amount, minimum amount due or any other amount higher than the minimum amount due. *Refer MITC for more details
Drive On
Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using IDBI Bank World Card across all fuel stations for transactions in the range of Rs. 400 to Rs. 5000. So keep driving and enjoying with friends and family.
*Maximum waiver of upto Rs. 500 per month
Air Travel Accident Insurance Cover
IDBI Bank Euphoria World Credit Card provides an air travel accident insurance cover worth Rs. 25 lakhs to put your mind at ease while you travel for business or leisure.
Airport Lounge Access
Enjoy luxury at select airport lounges in India. No matter which airline or class you fly, your Euphoria World card offers you well deserved rest and use of facilities. You will surely find it useful to relieve travel fatigue and escape airport chaos.
The airport lounge access is being provided by master and is subject to change as per MasterCard discretion from time to time without any prior notice.
IDBI Bank Euphoria World Credit Card offers 12 complimentary lounge visits per calendar year at participating Airport Lounges in India.
For the list of participating Lounges please click here
Wider Acceptance
Get more freedom with your Euphoria World Credit Card. You can use it at over 9 lakh merchants in India and over 29 million merchants abroad.
Zero Lost Card Liability
In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Customer Care 1800-209-4324 (Toll free) / 022-67719100 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank.
Family Cards
Make IDBI Bank your family Bank by gifting your family members (only for members above 18 years) an add-on World Credit Card. The add-on card enables your family members to avail all the benefits and features applicable on the primary card. The Delight Points earned on the add-on cards will be clubbed with those of the primary card and can be redeemed as per the higher eligibility.
You may apply for upto 2 add-on cards for your family members.
MasterCard Offers
Customers will be eligible for exclusive offers on airport shopping, hotel, car rentals etc. which are provided for MasterCard World cardholde Customers can enjoy travel concierge services provided by MasterCard for their travel related services. These offers are provided by MasterCard and may change as per MasterCard’s discretion from time to time without any prior notice.

About The Card
The IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum Credit Card is for those who aspire for more rewards and
convenience in every walk of life. This card is specially designed to provide you
best-in-class privileges in traveling, dining, lifestyle and to meet your other
aspirational needs. This card brings you unparalleled discounts and offers to suit your
lifestyle and preferences both in India and abroad.
IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum Credit Card is currently being offered with no
joining fees, so hurry up! Call our Customer Care at 1800-209-4324 (Toll Free) or 022-67719100 (Call Charges Applicable) or visit the nearest branch.
Credit Card Welcome e-Kit
The digitised Credit Card Welcome e-Kit is IDBI Bank’s constant endeavor towards the Go Green initiative. This e-Kit provides the cardholder with detailed information regarding Card Usage, Cardholders Agreement and Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC), in a downloadable PDF format.

Features and Benefits
Earn More while you Spend
The IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum Card understands your lifestyle and rewards you for your needs. You will earn 2 Delight Points for every 150 spent by you using your Aspire Platinum Card; so enjoy on travelling, shopping, dining-out or watching movies, get rewarded for all your spends. Additionally, enjoy bonus delight points as following:
500 bonus delight points on card activation.
500 bonus delight points on first transaction of Rs. 1,500 or more within 30 days of card activation.
Additional milestone benefit of 1,000 points on net annual spends of Rs. 1 lakhs.
Additional milestone benefit of 1,500 points on net annual spends of Rs. 2 lakhs.
*Delight points would be accrued only on transactions except the ones exempted from delight points accrual. Refer the exempted transaction categories here.
Interest Free Credit
Enjoy interest free credit of up to 48 days* on your purchases and manage your payments
as per your convenience. You can choose to pay the total outstanding amount, minimum
amount due or any other amount higher than the minimum amount due.
*Refer MITC for more details
Drive On
Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum
Card across all fuel stations for transactions in the range of 400 to 4000. So keep
driving and enjoying with friends and family.
*Maximum waiver of upto 300 per month
Wider Acceptance
Get more freedom with your Aspire Credit Card. You can use it at over 9 lakh merchants
in India and over 29 million merchants abroad.
Zero Lost Card Liability
In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Customer Care 1800-209-4324 (Toll free) / 022-67719100 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately
blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after
reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank.
Family Cards
Make IDBI Bank your family Bank by gifting your family (only for members above 18
years) an add-on Aspire Platinum Credit Card. The add-on card enables your family
members to avail all the benefits and features applicable on the primary card. The
Delight Points earned on the add-on cards will be clubbed with those of the primary
card and can be redeemed as per the higher eligibility.
VISA offers
Customers will be eligible for exclusive offers on airport shopping, hotel,car rentals
etc. which are provided for VISA Platinum cardholde Customers can enjoy travel
concierge services provided by VISA for their travel related services. These offers are
provided by VISA and may change as per VISA’s discretion from time to time without any
prior notice

These offers are provided by VISA and may change as per VISA’s discretion from time to time without any prior notice.

About The Card
IDBI Bank welcomes you to the Winners Club. Now stay one step ahead always in life with your `Winnings' Credit Card. You will always enjoy an edge over your compeer with your intelligently designed 'Winnings' Credit Card.
With IDBI Bank `Winnings' Credit Card, always enjoy an extra convenience, security, and flexibility wherever you go!
For further details call Customer Care at 1800-209-4324 (Toll Free) or 022-67719100 (Call Charges Applicable) or visit the nearest IDBI Bank branch.
Credit Card Welcome e-Kit
The digitized Credit Card Welcome e-Kit is IDBI Bank’s constant endeavor towards the Go Green initiative. This e-Kit provides the cardholder with detailed information regarding Card Usage, Cardholders Agreement and Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC), in a downloadable PDF format.
Card Usage Guide

Features and Benefits
Earn More while you Spend
The `Winnings' Credit Card always gives you something extra. You will earn 2 Delight Points for every Rs. 100 spent on your card. So shop till you drop with your `Winnings` Credit Card and get irresistible offers from globally renowned brands redeemable against your Delight Points. Additionally, enjoy bonus delight points as following:
500 bonus delight points on card activation.
500 bonus delight points on first transaction of Rs. 1,000 or more within 30 days of card activation.
Additional milestone benefit of 1,000 points on net annual spends of Rs. 1 lakhs.
Additional milestone benefit of 1,500 points on net annual spends of Rs. 2 lakhs.
*Delight points would be accrued only on transactions except the ones exempted from delight points accrual. Refer the exempted transaction categories here.
Interest Free Credit
Enjoy interest free credit of up to 48 days* on your purchases and manage your payments as per your convenience. You can choose to pay the total outstanding amount, minimum amount due or any other amount higher than the minimum amount due
*Refer MITC for more details
Drive On
Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using IDBI Bank Winnings RuPay Select card across all fuel stations for
transactions in the range of Rs. 400 to Rs. 4000. So keep driving and enjoying with friends and family.
*Maximum waiver of upto Rs. 400 per month
Personal Accident Insurance Cover
Accidental Death: Cover of Rs. 10.00 lakh in case of loss of life due to accident.
Permanent Disability: Cover of Rs. 10.00 lakh in case of permanent disability due to accident.
Criteria:
Age -18 years to 70 years
Card Usage - One successful financial or non-financial transaction at any channel is done in the last 90 days prior to the incident.
Airport Lounge Access
A smart man always makes the smartest move. Get away from the terminal traffic during a delayed flight to immerse in the comfort of plush airport lounges with delicious cuisine in India or abroad, absolutely free with your IDBI Bank `Winnings' Credit Card.
The airport lounge access is being provided by RuPay and is subject to change as per RuPay’s discretion from time to time without any prior notice.
IDBI Bank Winnings Credit Card offers 2 complimentary lounge visits per calendar quarter at participating Airport Lounges in India and 2 complimentary lounge visits per calendar half year at participating Airport Lounges outside India.
For list of participating lounges, please Click Here
Note: Per quarter period would be considered from 15th of the month i.e. Jan 15 - Apr 15, Apr 15 - Jul 15, Jul 15 - Oct 15 and Oct 15 - Jan 15.
Wider Acceptance
You can use your Winnings Credit Card for booking Air/IRCTC/Bus/Hotels/ Movie tickets or enjoying Dining, Shopping, Paying Utility Bills, Recharge, Fuel and much more at over 39.3 million merchants and 1.88 million ATMS spread across India and abroad, securely with RuPay PaySecure and also earn Delight points on your transactions.
Zero Lost Card Liability
In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Customer Care 1800-209-4324 (Toll free) / 022-67719100 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank.
Family Cards
Make IDBI Bank your family Bank by gifting your family members (only for members above 18 years) an add-on Winnings RuPay Credit Card. The add-on card enables your family members to avail all the benefits and features applicable on the primary card. The reward points earned on the add-on cards will be clubbed with those of the primary card and can be redeemed as per the higher eligibility.
You may apply for upto 2 add-on cards for your family members.

Overview
IDBI Bank’s LUCC Scheme is for the existing borrowers belonging to micro and small individual units, retail traders, artisans and village industries, professionals and self employed, whose dealings with the Bank have been satisfactory for the last three years.
Eligible Segments
All existing customers having a satisfactory dealing with the Bank for the last 3 years
Facility
Only working capital in the form of Overdraft/ Open Cash Credit
Purpose
To meet the credit requirements of the borrowers mentioned above
Loan Amount
Maximum of Rs. 10 lakhs per borrower
Tenor / Validity
Repayment on demand, however limit would be valid for a period of 3 years
Pricing
Interest Rate linked to Bank Base Rate and Rating.
Security
Hypothecation of stock in trade, receivables, machinery, office equipment etc., as specified for existing limits
margin
25%
